SEARCH
Module geomed.app
Package geomed.app.model

Class Hospital

java.lang.Object
geomed.app.model.Point
geomed.app.model.Site
geomed.app.model.Hospital
public class Hospital extends Site
Represents a medical facility on the map. This class extends Site to inherit geometric properties (x, y, id) and adds business logic specific to hospital management such as capacity, saturation levels, and medical specialties.
Version:
2.0

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Hospital(double x, double y, int id, int capacityMax)
    Constructs a new Hospital with specified coordinates, identifier, and maximum capacity.

  • Constructor Details

    • Hospital

      public Hospital(double x, double y, int id, int capacityMax)
      Constructs a new Hospital with specified coordinates, identifier, and maximum capacity.
      Parameters:
      x - The X coordinate of the hospital on the map.
      y - The Y coordinate of the hospital on the map.
      id - The unique identifier of the hospital.
      capacityMax - The maximum patient capacity (must be strictly positive).
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if capacityMax is less than or equal to zero.

  • Method Details

    • getOccupancyRate

      public double getOccupancyRate()
      Calculates the current occupancy rate of the hospital.
      Returns:
      A double value between 0.0 (empty) and 1.0 (full capacity).

    • isSaturated

      public boolean isSaturated()
      Checks whether the hospital has reached or exceeded its saturation threshold.
      Returns:
      true if the hospital is saturated, false otherwise.

    • admitPatient

      public boolean admitPatient()
      Attempts to admit a new patient to the hospital.
      Returns:
      true if the patient was successfully admitted, false if the hospital is already at full capacity.

    • dischargePatient

      public void dischargePatient()
      Discharges a patient from the hospital, freeing up one bed. If the hospital is already empty, this method does nothing.

    • addSpecialty

      public void addSpecialty(MedicalSpecialty specialty)
      Adds a medical specialty to the hospital's capabilities.
      Parameters:
      specialty - The MedicalSpecialty to add.

    • canTreat

      public boolean canTreat(MedicalSpecialty emergencyType)
      Checks if the hospital is equipped to treat a specific type of medical emergency.
      Parameters:
      emergencyType - The required medical specialty.
      Returns:
      true if the hospital has the specialty, false otherwise.

    • getCapacityMax

      public int getCapacityMax()
      Gets the maximum capacity of the hospital.
      Returns:
      The maximum number of patients.

    • getCurrentPatients

      public int getCurrentPatients()
      Gets the current number of patients in the hospital.
      Returns:
      The current patient count.

    • getSpecialties

      public Set<MedicalSpecialty> getSpecialties()
      Retrieves an unmodifiable view of the hospital's medical specialties. This defensive copy prevents external modification of the internal set.
      Returns:
      An unmodifiable Set containing the specialties.
